title: Exotic Spicy Norwegian Fish Dumplings
description: A spicy and silky Norwegian dish featuring fish, cornstarch, and a blend of spices, perfect for a cozy dinner. This recipe is also diabetic-friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the fish, cornstarch, onion, garlic, ginger, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Knead the mixture for about 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and sticky.
Divide the mixture into small balls, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a large pot, then reduce the heat to a simmer.
Carefully add the fish balls to the pot and cook for about 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the pot with a slotted spoon and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve with a side of steamed vegetables.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for later use.
Reheat the dumplings in the microwave or on the stovetop before serving.
